name: Scallop
description: Overlapping mermaid scales in deep-water teals — each scale re-inks itself on redraw, with golden ones glinting through the shoal.

code.style: --scale: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* upper rows stack above lower ones so each scale's rounded tail shows over the next row */ z-index: calc(@Y - @y + 1); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -8%; right: -8%; top: 0; height: 126%; background: var(--scale); border-radius: 0 0 50% 50% / 0 0 46% 46%; box-shadow: 0 calc(36px / @Y) calc(56px / @Y) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18); transition: ease 600ms; } @random(${shimmerFrequency}) { :after { background: var(--color5); } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
